case_title: JUDEH JUDEH B INDDBA G R MARKET VS JIFF VALLEY INVENTORY SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JUDEH JUDEH B INDDBA G R MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT JIFF VALLEY INVENTORY SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
